verdict.summary: The change correctly makes the six-round hard cap authoritative before base-budget continuation and rejects a base budget above the cap fail-closed. Input validation excludes booleans and non-positive caps. The self-tests are non-vacuous: they cover continuation immediately below the base==cap boundary, stopping exactly at that boundary, and rejection when base_rounds exceeds the cap, each with an outcome that would fail under the prior behavior. No trust check is weakened and no injection-directed text appears in the diff.
